message:
✨ Exact IMDB episode links via TMDB lookup (#49)

- Add _resolveImdbId() to look up IMDB ID via TMDB API (search → getTvShow)
- Cache results in _imdbIdCache to avoid repeated API calls
- Add _parseSeasonEpisode() returning (season, episode) tuple
- Build exact IMDB URLs: /title/ttXXXX/episodes/?season=N
- Falls back to IMDB search when TMDB key unavailable
- Show 🔍 icon while resolving, ↗ when exact link ready
- Import tmdb_client and shows_providers for API access

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
